macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Volatility: Price Swings Between $74,868 and $76,700
items.summary: Bitcoin has experienced significant volatility over the past 24 hours, trading between $74,868 and $76,700, with the price currently at $75,092, down 1.93% as of 09:30 AM UTC.

items.title: $326M in Crypto Liquidations Hit Market, Long Positions Hardest
items.summary: The cryptocurrency market experienced $326 million in liquidations over 24 hours, with long positions accounting for $265 million. Bitcoin long liquidations reached $59.09 million and Ethereum long liquidations hit $61.06 million, affecting 198,137 traders globally.

items.title: AAVE Plunges 10% Following $200M Kelp DAO DeFi Hack
items.summary: AAVE token dropped over 10% after a major exploit in the Kelp DAO protocol where attackers minted fake rsETH and borrowed real ETH, resulting in a $200 million loss.

items.title: $520M in Stablecoins Exit Ethereum in 24 Hours
items.summary: Over $520 million in stablecoins exited the Ethereum network within 24 hours, indicating significant market movement and potential investor repositioning.

items.title: Ethena Surges 14% on Increased Whale Activity
items.summary: Ethena token experienced a 14% increase, reaching significant resistance levels with increased trading volume and notable whale activity.

items.title: Dogecoin Eyes $0.10 Breakout as Analysts Identify Key Resistance
items.summary: Dogecoin is approaching a potential breakout at the $0.10 resistance level, with analyst Lars warning that one confirmation could trigger substantial price movement above this threshold.

items.title: Chainlink Drops 4% to $9.30 Amid Heavy Sell-Off
items.summary: Chainlink declined over 4% to reach $9.30, with trading volumes exceeding $600 million in a single day due to rapid sell-offs.

items.title: Binance Launches Investigation into Suspected RAVE Token Insider Trading
items.summary: Binance co-CEO has launched an investigation into suspected insider trading involving the RAVE token following recent market manipulation concerns.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: OpenAI Launches GPT-Rosalind for Life Sciences and Drug Discovery
items.summary: OpenAI released GPT-Rosalind, a specialized AI model for biology, drug discovery, and medical research that reads papers, generates hypotheses, plans experiments, and handles complex workflows. The launch accompanies GPT-5.4-Cyber for security and Agents SDK upgrades.

items.title: China's Humanoid Robots Race in Beijing Half Marathon
items.summary: Around 20 humanoid robots, including winner Tiangong Ultra (2:40:42 finish), participated in a Beijing half marathon, testing adaptation to crowds, uneven terrain, and real-world conditions outside labs.

items.title: Allbirds Pivots from Footwear to AI Company
items.summary: Struggling shoe brand Allbirds announced it is exiting the footwear business to reinvent itself as an artificial intelligence company.

items.title: AMD Stock Surges 40% on AI Collaboration Rumors and CPU Shortages
items.summary: AMD's stock rose over 40% in the past month amid CPU shortages and rumors of AI lab collaborations, reflecting broader market excitement around AI and earnings.

items.title: Google DeepMind Advances AI in Weather Forecasting and World Models
items.summary: DeepMind showcased breakthroughs like GraphCast for 15-day forecasts, GenCast probabilistic model, FGN for cyclone prediction (used by US Hurricane Center), and Genie for interactive 3D worlds.

items.title: Forbes Releases 2026 AI 50 List Highlighting Top Startups
items.summary: Forbes' annual AI 50 list features promising private AI companies like OpenAI, Anthropic, and Chai Discovery, which raised billions for applications in law, engineering, medicine, and more.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Capcom's Pragmata Launches to Overwhelmingly Positive Steam Reviews
items.summary: Capcom's new sci-fi action game Pragmata debuted with 97% positive English reviews on Steam within 24 hours of launch, ranking among the publisher's highest-rated titles ever, just behind Resident Evil 4 Remake. The game has solidified Capcom's strong 2026 performance alongside other top-rated releases.

items.title: Gaming News Roundup: Wuthering Waves 3.3 Update and More
items.summary: Wuthering Waves gears up for Version 3.3 with new story content, characters, and anniversary rewards; Chaos Zero Nightmare announces half-anniversary events with free rewards. Last Origin nears global release, Neverness to Everness previews gameplay ahead of April 29 launch, and Marvel Rivals reveals Season 7.5 roadmap.

items.title: Upcoming Releases: Ricochet Raven and Cosmos Force Launch April 21
items.summary: Ricochet Raven, a parry-focused action game, and Cosmos Force, a turn-based tactics title, are set to release on PC via Steam on April 21. Additional limited-time free Steam titles and Game Informer weekend recommendations highlight Pragmata.

items.title: Industry Buzz: Denuvo Debates, PS6 Backward Compatibility Rumors, NVIDIA RTX 3060 Return
items.summary: Discussions intensify around Denuvo's declining effectiveness due to bypass methods; early rumors suggest PS6 backward compatibility support. NVIDIA reportedly reintroduces the budget GeForce RTX 3060, and SNK opens pre-orders for NEOGEO AES+.

items.title: Game Informer Recommends Pragmata for Weekend Play
items.summary: Game Informer's weekend gaming roundup spotlights Capcom's newly released sci-fi title Pragmata as a must-play, praising its quality amid ongoing industry updates.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Perovskite Solar Cells Achieve 26.61% Certified Efficiency
items.summary: Researchers have developed perovskite solar cells reaching a record 26.61% certified efficiency using a cesium-doping strategy. This breakthrough advances high-efficiency, low-cost solar technology.

items.title: Automated Roll-to-Roll Manufacturing Produces 300 Metalenses Per Second
items.summary: A collaborative research group created a fully automated roll-to-roll platform for large-area visible metalenses at 300 units per second. This innovation enables scalable production of advanced optical components.

items.title: Engineered Yeast Enables Eco-Friendly Rare-Earth Element Extraction
items.summary: University of Illinois researchers developed a method using oxalic acid from engineered sugar-eating yeast to extract nearly all rare-earth elements from low-grade ore. This green technique boosts U.S. competitiveness in critical minerals for electronics and clean energy.

items.title: RNA Barcodes Enable High-Speed Brain Connection Mapping
items.summary: Scientists used RNA barcodes to map connections among thousands of neurons in the mouse brain with unprecedented speed and resolution. This tool accelerates neuroscience research on brain wiring.
